findings.title: no real PR/CI
findings.description: No actual pull request exists for C5D, and no remote GitHub Actions execution has validated the SHA.

findings.title: Playwright journeys do not execute declared moderation/forum flows
findings.description: Playwright tests are missing concrete verification steps for locking/unlocking, post hiding, multi-user isolation, etc., often skipping major steps using optional locator patterns.

findings.title: mixed REVIEW/PLACE_COMMENT moderator queue indexing defect
findings.description: DbalModerationQueueQuery contains an incorrect key assignment where PLACE_COMMENT and REVIEW comment IDs overwrite one another due to map collision.

findings.title: no real Axe execution
findings.description: The accessibility audit was asserted with a static JSON of 0 violations without running AxeBuilder scans.

findings.title: raw fetch and manual moderator DTO
findings.description: The moderator queue/case and forum components use manual native fetch instead of the generated API client.

findings.title: remaining any, alert and confirm
findings.description: Web app uses native alert and window.confirm browser dialogs and loose 'any' casts.

findings.title: missing pagination in forum and moderator UI
findings.description: The moderator queue is locked to page 1 and size 50, and forum categories/threads lack proper pagination.

findings.title: feed cards do not link to sources
findings.description: Activity feed cards do not point users to the actual thread/post/review section, leaving cards as dead UI components.

findings.title: insufficient Vitest community coverage
findings.description: Vitest community tests do not cover forum category rendering, thread/post creation, pagination, locking, or custom reporting dialog states.

findings.title: non-auditable evidence
findings.description: Evidence files contain unsupported static YES/NO checklists instead of real command output and execution metrics.

findings.title: unsafe production rollback semantics
findings.description: The down() migration drops core structural linkages and triggers destructive cascades under production environments.

findings.title: inconsistent tree SHA
findings.description: The previous tree SHA report was inconsistent with the actual git commit tree SHA.

findings.title: PR #10 remains open
findings.description: Stale draft pull request #10 is still open.
